THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRAZER, GEORDIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELBERT, TERRY J THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 875 FULTON STREET #8 SAN FRANCISCO CALIFORNIA, STAYED UNTIL APR-30-2008, IF DEFT FAILS TO TIMELY VACATE AND SURRENDER COMPLETE POSSESSION TO PLTF ON OR BEFORE THE MOVE OUT DATE, ESSENTIAL TERMS ARE STATED IN THE SCANNED DOC. IF DEFT TIMELY VACATES THE PREMISES, ESSENTIAL TERMS ARE STATED IN THE SCANNED DOCUMENT. OTHER ESSENTIAL TERMS ARE STATED IN THE SCANNED DOCUMENT.

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Justin Sisco, property manager, is appearing on behalf of plaintiff Geordie Frazer.
Joseph Alcordo Sacramento appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Terry J. Elbert is present.
Kavita Aggarwal representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 875 Fulton Street #8 San Francisco California.

This case settled, the trial date of April 1, 2008 is vacated.
